triggers.name: Enemy timer: Leg Cut
triggers.comments: ~1m00s at level 50 (formula 7, cap 10 ticks); DoT/debuff; the engine rescales to the profile's level; Berserker level 32. v1 keys enemy timers by spell name only — two mobs under the same spell share one bar.

triggers.name: Enemy timer: Leg Slice
triggers.comments: ~1m00s at level 50 (formula 7, cap 10 ticks); DoT/debuff; the engine rescales to the profile's level; Berserker level 54. v1 keys enemy timers by spell name only — two mobs under the same spell share one bar.

triggers.name: Enemy timer: Leg Strike
triggers.comments: ~1m00s at level 50 (formula 7, cap 10 ticks); DoT/debuff; the engine rescales to the profile's level; Berserker level 8. v1 keys enemy timers by spell name only — two mobs under the same spell share one bar.

triggers.name: Enemy timer cleared: Leg Cut
triggers.pattern: ^Your Leg Cut(?: (?P<rank>[IVXLCDM]+))? spell has worn off(?: of (.+))?\.$
triggers.comments: Cancels the cast-start countdown early (mez break, mob death) and re-announces on the overlay. Overlay text only — curated packs own the spoken wear-offs.
